faq.title: Got Questions? We've Got Answers
faq.description: We've gathered the most common questions from our clients about our painting services in Montijo.
faq.q1: How long does it take to paint a room?
faq.a1: It depends on the size and condition of the walls. On average, a standard room takes 1-2 days, including surface preparation, primer and two coats of paint.
faq.a2: Yes! We provide free, no-obligation quotes in Montijo and surrounding areas. Just contact us with the job details and we'll respond quickly with a price.
faq.a3: We use paints from recognized brands like Robbialac, CIN and Dyrup, ensuring durability, good finish and low odour.
faq.q4: Do I need to leave home during painting?
faq.a4: Not necessarily. We protect all furniture and flooring. We recommend good ventilation during and after painting to dissipate odours.
faq.q5: Do you do exterior and facade painting?
faq.a5: Yes! We carry out exterior painting with facade-specific, weather-resistant paints. We include crack treatment and waterproofing.
faq.q6: Do you serve condominiums and businesses in Montijo?
faq.a6: Yes! We provide services for individuals, condominiums, offices, shops and commercial spaces in Montijo, Alcochete, Moita and surrounding areas. We offer special rates for large areas.

servicePage.interiorIntro: Looking for professional interior painters in Montijo? PintaJá is the right choice — with 10+ years of experience, certified painters and premium brand paints, we guarantee a flawless finish in your home or office.
servicePage.interiorLong: PintaJá offers complete interior painting services in Montijo, Alcochete, Moita and surrounding areas. Our certified painters handle walls, ceilings, skirting boards and all interior finishes using premium paints from CIN, Robbialac and Dyrup. Each project includes careful surface preparation, full furniture and floor protection, specific primer application and two or more coats for a uniform, lasting result.

servicePage.interiorFaq1Q: How much does it cost to paint a room in Montijo?
servicePage.interiorFaq1A: Prices range from €3 to €8 per m², depending on wall condition, paint type and finish. For example, a 12m² bedroom can cost between €150 and €300. Contact PintaJá for a free, personalized quote in Montijo.
servicePage.interiorFaq2Q: How long does it take to paint a 2-bed apartment in Montijo?
servicePage.interiorFaq2A: A 2-bedroom apartment in Montijo takes on average 3-5 working days, including wall preparation, primer and two coats of paint. Larger apartments or those with wall issues may take longer.
servicePage.interiorFaq3Q: Do I need to leave home during interior painting?
servicePage.interiorFaq3A: No! We protect all furniture and floors with plastic sheeting and tape. We just recommend good ventilation. You can continue living in your Montijo home during the work.
servicePage.interiorFaq4Q: What paints do you use for interiors in Montijo?
servicePage.interiorFaq4A: We use interior paints from CIN, Robbialac and Dyrup — washable, low-odour and high coverage. Paint selection is made together with you to ensure the best result.
servicePage.exteriorIntro: Does your facade in Montijo need renovation? PintaJá specializes in exterior painting — facades, balconies, walls and exteriors — with high-durability, weather-resistant paints. Free quote within 24h.
servicePage.exteriorLong: Specialized in exterior painting in Montijo, PintaJá transforms facades, balconies, walls and exteriors with high-durability paints and UV protection. We perform complete exterior surface treatment: pressure washing, crack and fissure repair, degraded paint removal, waterproof primer application and painting with exterior-specific paints certified for 8-10 years of durability.

servicePage.exteriorFaq1Q: What paints do you use for facades in Montijo?
servicePage.exteriorFaq1A: We use exterior-specific paints from CIN and Robbialac, with UV protection, anti-fungal properties and rain resistance. These paints guarantee 8-10 years of durability even in Montijo's climate.
servicePage.exteriorFaq2Q: Do you paint buildings and condominiums in Montijo?
servicePage.exteriorFaq2A: Yes! We paint building facades, condominiums and villas in Montijo, Alcochete, Moita and surrounding areas. We offer special rates and quotes for large areas.
servicePage.exteriorFaq3Q: How much does it cost to paint a facade in Montijo?
servicePage.exteriorFaq3A: The price depends on the area, height and facade condition. On average, a house in Montijo costs between €1,500 and €5,000. Request a free quote for your specific case.
servicePage.exteriorFaq4A: Yes! Our exterior painting process in Montijo always includes waterproof primer application to protect the facade against leaks and damp.
servicePage.comercialIntro: Need to paint your office, shop or restaurant in Montijo? PintaJá offers commercial painting with flexible hours so your business isn't affected. Certified painters and free quotes.
servicePage.comercialLong: PintaJá provides commercial painting services in Montijo for offices, shops, restaurants, clinics, warehouses and all types of commercial spaces. We understand your business can't stop — so we work flexible hours, including evenings, weekends and holidays. Our professional painters guarantee fast, flawless finishes using washable, quick-drying, low-odour paints ideal for client and staff environments.

servicePage.comercialFaq1Q: Can you paint my Montijo office outside business hours?
servicePage.comercialFaq1A: Yes! We offer painting during flexible hours — evenings, weekends and holidays — to avoid interfering with your business in Montijo. Everything is planned in advance.
servicePage.comercialFaq2Q: Do you quote for large commercial spaces in Montijo?
servicePage.comercialFaq2A: Absolutely! We have special rates for offices, warehouses, shops and large commercial spaces in Montijo, Alcochete, Moita and surrounding areas.
servicePage.comercialFaq3Q: What type of paints do you use in commercial spaces?
servicePage.comercialFaq3A: We use washable, quick-drying, low-odour paints ideal for environments where clients and staff circulate. The paints are wear-resistant and easy to clean.
servicePage.comercialFaq4Q: How long does it take to paint an office in Montijo?
servicePage.comercialFaq4A: It depends on the area. A 50m² office can be done in a weekend. For larger areas, we present a detailed timeline to minimize business impact.
servicePage.preparacaoIntro: Wall preparation is the secret to lasting paint. PintaJá in Montijo treats cracks, damp, mould and imperfections before painting, ensuring the best possible result.
servicePage.preparacaoLong: Before any quality painting, professional surface preparation is essential. PintaJá in Montijo offers complete wall preparation and repair: crack treatment, damp and mould removal, old paint scraping, filler and levelling compound application, and primers suited to each surface type. This groundwork is the secret to paint that lasts years without peeling, bubbling or staining.

servicePage.preparacaoFaq1Q: Is wall treatment necessary before painting in Montijo?
servicePage.preparacaoFaq1A: Yes, it's essential! Without proper preparation, paint can peel, bubble or fail to adhere. PintaJá treats cracks, damp and imperfections before every painting job in Montijo.
servicePage.preparacaoFaq2Q: Do you treat damp problems in Montijo homes?
servicePage.preparacaoFaq2A: Yes! We identify the damp source — infiltration, condensation or rising damp — and apply specific treatments. We ensure the problem doesn't return after painting.
servicePage.preparacaoFaq3Q: How much does wall preparation cost in Montijo?
servicePage.preparacaoFaq3A: Preparation is often included in the painting quote. For complex cases (extensive damp, structural cracks), we provide a separate quote. Contact us for a free assessment.
servicePage.preparacaoFaq4Q: Can you fix walls with efflorescence in Montijo?
servicePage.preparacaoFaq4A: Yes! Efflorescence is common in older Montijo homes. We remove it, treat the wall with specific products and apply sealant before the final paint.

We offer a wide range of decorative effects: Venetian plaster, concrete/cement effect, various textures, custom murals, feature walls and metallic or pearlescent finishes. Our team has specialized training in decorative painting techniques for both homes and commercial spaces in Montijo. Free colour and design consultation included.

servicePage.tetosIntro: Does your Montijo home's ceiling need painting? PintaJá specializes in ceiling painting — uniform finish, no marks, no drips. Experienced painters with professional equipment.
servicePage.tetosLong: PintaJá specializes in ceiling painting in Montijo and surrounding areas. Ceilings are one of the most challenging surfaces to paint — requiring technique, experience and proper equipment for uniform coverage without marks, drips or splatter. Our team uses professional rollers and spray guns, ceiling-specific painting techniques and high-coverage matt paints.

servicePage.tetosFaq1Q: Does the ceiling need preparation before painting in Montijo?
servicePage.tetosFaq1A: Yes! We treat cracks, damp stains, peeling and irregularities. We apply appropriate primer to ensure adhesion and perfect coverage on Montijo ceilings.
servicePage.tetosFaq2Q: What paint do you use for ceilings in Montijo?
servicePage.tetosFaq2A: We use specific matt ceiling paints from CIN and Robbialac — high coverage, low splatter and quick drying. The matt finish hides minor imperfections.
servicePage.tetosFaq3Q: How much does it cost to paint a room ceiling in Montijo?
servicePage.tetosFaq3A: Prices range from €5 to €10 per m², depending on ceiling condition and repairs needed. A living room ceiling (20m²) costs on average €100-€200. Request a free quote.
servicePage.tetosFaq4Q: Do you paint plasterboard and drywall ceilings in Montijo?
servicePage.tetosFaq4A: Yes! We have experience painting plasterboard, drywall, concrete and false ceilings. We adapt technique and paint to the surface type for the best result.
servicePage.impermeabilizacaoIntro: Damp or leak problems in Montijo? PintaJá offers professional waterproofing for walls, facades, basements and terraces. Free diagnosis and certified products.
servicePage.impermeabilizacaoLong: PintaJá offers professional waterproofing services in Montijo to protect your property from damp, leaks and condensation. We treat interior and exterior walls, facades, basements, garages, terraces and roofs with certified waterproofing products from top brands. Our service starts with a complete diagnosis to identify the problem source and apply the right solution.

servicePage.impermeabilizacaoFaq1Q: How do you detect the source of leaks in Montijo?
servicePage.impermeabilizacaoFaq1A: We perform a complete, free diagnosis to identify the source — crack infiltration, rising damp by capillarity or condensation. Only then do we apply the appropriate treatment.
servicePage.impermeabilizacaoFaq2Q: Does waterproofing work in basements and garages in Montijo?
servicePage.impermeabilizacaoFaq2A: Yes! We have specific solutions for basements and garages in Montijo, including rising damp treatment and waterproofing membrane application on interior and exterior.
servicePage.impermeabilizacaoFaq3Q: How much does it cost to waterproof a facade in Montijo?
servicePage.impermeabilizacaoFaq3A: Prices vary with area and treatment type needed. On average, facade waterproofing costs between €8 and €20 per m². Contact us for a free diagnosis and quote.
servicePage.impermeabilizacaoFaq4Q: Does waterproofing fix efflorescence problems in Montijo?
servicePage.impermeabilizacaoFaq4A: Yes! Efflorescence is caused by rising damp, common in Montijo homes near the river. We remove the efflorescence, treat the wall and apply waterproofing barriers for a definitive solution.
